trigger_observable_action.utterance_summary: Sella opens bounded diagnostic contact only under decon route Three, isolation, packet-sound preservation, and Maer's live ledger exposure.

participant_appraisals.private_interpretation: Maer reads Sella's conditions as a narrow working bridge, not a refusal of care. He fears the diagnostic language could become a place where a possible life is made administratively quiet, but he judges that challenging the language now would likely destroy the only contact path still performable under the heat window.
participant_appraisals.attributed_motive: Sella has built a narrow working bridge under hard capacity limits, not refused care.
participant_appraisals.misread_risk: Low to medium. Maer may still underweight how much operational burden Sella is controlling, but he does not challenge her limits in this turn.

state_deltas.rationale: He is now managing live contact, not only arguing for authorization.
The next action is concrete and under way.
Sella's conditions are performable rather than evasive.

relationship_deltas.rationale: Sella's conditions are performable and contact is now moving.
She made care material without pretending it was clean.
Maer has attached live ledger exposure to the contact path.

next_action_constraints: Diagnostic channel is open, but contact awaits Sella's timing mark.
Maer must keep ledger exposure live through contact and failed extraction.

trigger_observable_action.utterance_summary: Accepted. Bounded diagnostic contact only. No full intake, no custody, no personhood finding, no cargo designation. Packet sound remains preservation-only until diagnostic handling is complete. Decon route Three. Isolation absolute. My ledger stays live for staff time, heat burden, and failed extraction cost. Permission is not capacity; the ledger will not pretend otherwise. Open the channel on your timing mark, Sella. We will listen before the window closes.
observable_cues: Maer's Navigator interface brightens along the wet/dry work surface. His ledger seal re-locks beside the overtime, heat-management, isolation, decon, and failed-extraction cost lines, then extends into a live exposure band tied to the heat-window countdown. A low acoustic packet opens through the preservation-only channel, tagged diagnostic contact, noncustodial, nonorigin, unresolved. The rescue craft receives a routed command to hold at decon route Three and wait for Sella's timing mark before contact.

participant_appraisals.private_interpretation: Maer accepted the clinic limits without trying to turn her conditions into theater; the ledger is now materially live, but the bay remains bounded and the artifact remains unresolved.
participant_appraisals.attributed_motive: Maer wants contact before the heat window closes and is willing to bear visible cost exposure to keep that path legal and performable.
participant_appraisals.misread_risk: Low. Sella may still suspect the category, but Maer's observable action supports material accountability.

state_deltas.rationale: The bay is now moving toward actual contact under her timing mark.
More live channels and coordination demands enter the room.

relationship_deltas.rationale: Maer accepted material conditions rather than only moral pressure.
He waited for clinic timing and did not override decon authority.
The ask is less exploitative when the ledger remains live.
The bay now moves toward active contact under her control.

next_action_constraints: Sella must mark decon timing before contact proceeds.
No full intake or personhood finding is available.
